<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.44.7-Solothurn">
  <identifier></identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language></language>
  <type></type>
  <title></title>
  <abstract>This layer was generated using the 'Time Map - Simple' algorithm from the TravelTime plugin version 1.9.0. The following parameters were used : 
INPUT_EXISTING_FIELDS_TO_KEEP: []
INPUT_ID: 'searches_' || $id
INPUT_LEVEL_OF_DETAIL: 0
INPUT_NO_HOLES: False
INPUT_SEARCHES: Puskesmas_KTMuting_889b5163_78a0_4841_9ec3_4eab85a87e53
INPUT_SEARCH_TYPE: 1
INPUT_SINGLE_SHAPE: False
INPUT_TIME: 2025-11-04T08:00:00
INPUT_TRAVEL_TIME: 20
INPUT_TRNSPT_TYPE: 1
OUTPUT: TEMPORARY_OUTPUT
OUTPUT_RESULT_TYPE: 0
SETTINGS_ROBUST_MODE: False
SETTINGS_TIMEZONE: 277</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="TTP_ALGORITHM">
    <keyword>ttp_v4:time_map_simple</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <keywords vocabulary="TTP_PARAMS">
    <keyword>{"INPUT_EXISTING_FIELDS_TO_KEEP": [], "INPUT_ID": "'searches_' || $id", "INPUT_LEVEL_OF_DETAIL": 0, "INPUT_NO_HOLES": false, "INPUT_SEARCHES": "Puskesmas_KTMuting_889b5163_78a0_4841_9ec3_4eab85a87e53", "INPUT_SEARCH_TYPE": 1, "INPUT_SINGLE_SHAPE": false, "INPUT_TIME": "2025-11-04T08:00:00", "INPUT_TRAVEL_TIME": 20, "INPUT_TRNSPT_TYPE": 1, "OUTPUT": "TEMPORARY_OUTPUT", "OUTPUT_RESULT_TYPE": 0, "SETTINGS_ROBUST_MODE": false, "SETTINGS_TIMEZONE": 277}</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <keywords vocabulary="TTP_VERSION">
    <keyword>1.9.0</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <links/>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt></wkt>
      <proj4></proj4>
      <srsid>0</srsid>
      <srid>0</srid>
      <authid></authid>
      <description></description>
      <projectionacronym></projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym></ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent/>
</qgis>
